## Checklist

- [ ] Explicit types everywhere — no `var`
- [ ] Comments are short one-liners (no banners or paragraph blocks)
- [ ] EditMode tests pass locally in the Unity Test Runner; new behavior has coverage where it makes sense
- [ ] README updated if the public API changed
- [ ] No hand edits under `Assets/Flock/Generated/` (that tree is codegen output and gets wiped)
